title: Gomphrena longipes
taxonomy: Gomphrena longipes is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaranthaceae. This classification suggests that Gomphrena longipes is closely related to other plants in the same family, such as amaranths and pinks. Gomphrena longipes is native to the Americas, where it can be found growing in sandy soils and other dry environments. The classification of Gomphrena longipes as a member of the Amaranthaceae family reflects its distinctive characteristics and growth habits.
